description_long: This object is a small, dark amber glass bottle with a black dropper cap, commonly used for dispensing liquid medicines such as CBD oil. The front label is gold and prominently displays 'Full Spectrum CBD' along with dosage information and branding details. The bottle is cylindrical with a smooth, glossy surface, and the dropper top is made of black plastic with a soft, rubbery bulb for dispensing the liquid inside. The side and back labels provide supplement facts, usage instructions, and a barcode, all printed in gold on a dark background. The bottle is compact and designed to be easily portable, fitting comfortably in one hand. Its overall appearance is professional and typical of health supplement packaging found in urban pharmacies or wellness shops.
description: A small amber glass bottle with a black dropper cap and gold labeling, designed for dispensing liquid medicine such as CBD oil. The bottle features detailed branding and supplement information on its labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold label with 'Full Spectrum CBD' and dosage details clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the supplement facts and part of the gold label wrapping around the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the barcode, additional product information, and the continuation of the gold label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting icons, more text, and the barcode at the bottom of the label.
attribute_label_text: FULL SPECTRUM CBD CANNABIS EXTRACT 8.3 mg CBD / 1 mL 250mg Total Dietary Supplement Supplement Facts [illegible] Other Ingredients: [illegible] Suggested Use: [illegible] Keep out of reach of children. [illegible] Barcode
